title: ceropegia recurviloba
intro: Ceropegia recurviloba, also known as the twisted maid's hair or hanging foxglove, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and soothing respiratory issues. Ceropegia recurviloba can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
